item.title: RELIANCE - Board Meeting Outcome: Q4FY26 Results
item.description: Reliance Industries Q4FY26 results: Net profit up 18% YoY to Rs 19,488 Cr. Revenue grew 12%. Jio ARPU at Rs 198.

item.title: INFY : Quarterly Results — Revenue Guidance Raised
item.description: Infosys Q1FY27: Revenue guidance raised to 8-10% for FY27. Large deal wins USD 4.1 bn. AI-driven demand strong.

item.title: HDFCBANK - FII Holding Update
item.description: HDFC Bank FII holding increases to 55.2% from 54.8%. No material corporate announcement.

item.title: General Notice - Exchange Update
item.description: This is an exchange-level operational update with no specific symbol. Routine compliance notice.
